reviews.review_description: great game can stop playing it
Wish it was on the quest 3
Graphics are great, really enjoyable game, well worth the money

Ok so if you tried gunjack 2 on oculus go and realized like i did its 100% broken (try it if you dont trust me lol) and were turned off by this one there isnt as much here but its done very well its very stable it makes me soooo sad they abandoned gunjack2 and left it broken for the oculus go but this game stands on its own merits its very good
Good old school...
Cool game. A little repetitive but overall still fun.
Great game! I am new to Vr but I absolutely love this app

Audio is messed up. Im using bluetooth headphones.

Update: it's been months... Will developers fix bluetooth audio issues?
Beautiful game.  Smooth, no bugs.  Great sound and graphics
App says it was built fire an older version of android  won't work...  I was really looking forward to trying this one too. Don't even want a refund.  I just want it to work :(
...nice little game, easy to play, good for between

Visually great, well written dialogue, and sufficiently challenging.  I find myself going be to already completed levels to beat my previous scores, so there’s decent replay ability.  Wish there were more levels, though.

reviews.review_title: Does not work with Bluetooth headphones.
reviews.review_description: Which is a limitation i have never encountered in any other game. Your money would probably be better spent on Endspace. Will reconsider review when Bluetooth issue is fixed.
Great game. It's a little repetitive, but what game isn't. It did take awhile to figure out how to reload and use special weapons, tutorial says to swipe up, but you have to swipe left or right.
This game is amazing!! As for tapping the side of your oculus go, you just have to pull the trigger on the controller. This game is a must buy!

This game is what VR should be, incredible graphics and an all around fun game.  I have never had as much fun on an XBOX or PS4.  Lastly, please Oculus keep your prices affordable for quality games lime this one as they are now.  I left standard gaming because the pricing just became ridiculous.  I have already purchased 4 of your games because they are priced so reasonable.
This is a really nice shooting game it reminds me of one of the movies I've seen. The levels are increasingly harder and harder. This is a very addictive game
When it loads..it asked you to tap side of headset! There is no dann button on side of Go!! Don't waste your money!

reviews.review_title: Like a VR Space Invaders meets Asteroids
reviews.review_description: So far I’ve played the game for about 30 minutes and it’s a sweet VR space invaders. R the holiday price of $2 this was a great value. Get it. You’ll have a blast.
Good frist download
